feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Dead Reckoning Part Two
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 205,554Chapters: 12/12Kudos: 11

Summary: Aven is living on borrowed time, his body harboring something intelligent, dangerous, and very much awake. As powerful corporations circle and a desperate mission pushes him deep into enemy territory, survival demands disguises, secrets, and impossible trust. Love offers brief sanctuary, even as it makes everything more fragile. Hunted, exposed, and running out of room to run, Aven must face the truth:staying alive may cost more than dying ever would...

entry.title: Kryptonian Reproduction, an Observation
entry.summary:
Author: Winkaku

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 88,322Chapters: 29/29Kudos: 1,772

Summary: They'd been caught in each others orbit for some time now and, quite frankly, Clark should have seen this coming. Crazy was part and parcel to Gotham after all... let alone his own life. His father had warned him about mad scientists, but Clark had the distinct feeling that this was not what he'd envisioned in the slightest.AKA: A series of PWP vignettes wherein the plot is entirely background and I burn through kinks faster than a sorority freshman. Seriously, I’m running out of ideas, leave a comment with a suggestion and I’ll see what I can do.AKA: That time I tried to make a kinky science fic that turned into a writing challenge that turned into a crazy romp with associated art pieces. Fun was had by all.

entry.summary:
Author: the_oncoming_stormageddon

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,612Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 100

Summary: Clark thought his feelings for Bruce were resolved; he knows Bruce will never love him back. The flowers slowly growing up his throat say otherwise.AKA, it's a superbat hanahaki fic. Title taken from "Love Is A Canyon" by Noah Cyrus and Orville Peck.

entry.title: Let The Soft Animal Of Your Body (Love What It Loves)
entry.summary:
Author: m0ld7igma

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,100Chapters: 4/8Kudos: 11

Summary: Conner Kent dies with Tim Drake’s name still dawdling in his mouth.After that, the world keeps ending in smaller ways.Tim starts stealing from Cadmus. Bruce starts looking at him like he’s an active bomb. Dick tries to pull him back towards earth. Somewhere between grief and devotion and something unbearably close to love, Tim decides death is a problem that can and will be solved.The terrible thing is that he’s just smart enough to, almost, do it...

entry.title: Sorry but you’re not my type!
entry.summary:
Author: miuwk4t

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,767Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 59

Summary: In the game, this was where the player usually picked, the translucent boxes appeared again, giving him another three choices.> Insult him back> Defend yourself confidently> Challenge himClark was aware that all three options would lead him to something bad, it was a trap.Yet, he was too busy losing his mind because Bruce’s voice sounded even hotter in person,“Oh my god,” Clark blurted softly before he could stop himself.-Or, Clark wakes up to a virtual otaku game and falls inlove with his rival, Bruce instead of his main interest.(P.S : I wanted to write atleast more rhan 5k words but I didn’t sleep for 6 hours and my neck aches)

entry.title: I Used To Obsess Over Living, Now I Only Obsess Over You
entry.summary:
Author: l0s3rzclub

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,502Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 137

Summary: Clark, of course, knew that Bruce Wayne had been studying at Metropolis University. The billionaire was all anyone could talk about when he first got accepted. Except for Clark. He'd actually counted himself lucky to never run into the guy. entry.title: The Room
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,803Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 5

Summary: Three months after the docks, Saul DiGennaro has one job: get it exactly right. The Maroni family is gone. Something is moving into the vacuum from outside — not Gotham-native, which makes it more dangerous. Made men who survived the bust are being absorbed or disappeared. Saul has six weeks, maybe less. Then he comes home early for the first time in years. A Daily Planet reporter arrives in Gotham asking questions about the power vacuum. A man in a cape is already there, asking different questions through different channels. They keep arriving at the same sources, the same locations, the same conclusions, without knowing it.It was a proposition across a card table in a Maroni club. Neither of them knew, at the time, what they were actually looking at. They’re starting to know now.

entry.title: Thirty Years of Reflex
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,429Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 4

Summary: Three months after the dock, Saul DiGennaro is the most useful man in a city that hasn't decided yet whether to kill him. The Maroni borgata is gone. Something is filling the vacuum — outside money, lawyers who know Gotham, and no patience for unaligned made men with institutional knowledge and nowhere to put it. The clock is running. Saul knows what the end of the clock sounds like. His son built a map of the city's bought judiciary for a college essay. Smart kid. Wrong moment. Clark Kent comes to Gotham as himself. Not Tony. Saul made that a condition. Someone else has been watching the Carroll Heights address for three weeks. Not from a rental car. One thing at a time.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: sunflower state
entry.summary:
Author: floatingflowers

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,686Chapters: 3/6Kudos: 119

Summary: “What you thinking so hard about?” Clark asked, his large hand coming to rest lightly on Bruce’s thigh. Bruce blinked out of his reverie, turning to look at Clark’s profile as the man focused on the road. His curls fluttered around in the breeze of the AC, and his eyes sparkled with energy from the sun. Clark’s red flannel shirt that Bruce pretended to hate was rolled up to his elbows, unintentionally showing off his powerful forearms. To Bruce, he was the most gorgeous man in the world. “You.” Bruce replied, uncharacteristically sentimental. He was rewarded with Clark’s small, shy smile, and traces of red colouring his cheeks, tracing up to the tips of his ears. Clark didn’t respond, and Bruce took some satisfaction in his ability to render Clark speechless, but he felt Clark’s love all the same, the other man gently squeezing his thigh. “Get a room!” Dick gagged from the back, wriggling around with his seatbelt. Bruce hit his head back against the headrest once more. It would be a long twenty minutes to Smallville. Or: Clark takes Bruce and Dick to Smallville to meet his parents

entry.title: Parenting Handbook for Dummy 101: How to Bring Your Kids Together with Your Significant Other
entry.summary:
Author: Speechless_since_1998

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,053Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 362

Summary: Bruce never locked the door to his room. To understand what happened next, you had to keep in mind this: Bruce never closed it, because he knew that one of his children, sooner or later, would need him. It didn't escape him the irony that a paranoid man like him, who thought of all kinds of scenarios, never thought of ever closing his bedroom door. But that was his family, and Bruce had always had a soft spot for his family. That's how he and Clark had found themselves in that situation: both on his bed, Bruce sitting on Clark's thighs, his shirt pulled down to his shoulders, Clark's hands in his pants, purple bruises on his neck and chest, and his children standing in the doorway. Because apparently no one thought that he should knock anymore, or because they believed that there was no chance for him to have company in his room, he didn't know which was more depressing. "Hi everyone," Clark was the first to talk, trying to ease the tension, as if they hadn't just seen where his hands were until a few seconds before.

entry.title: HAIL MARY
entry.summary:
Author: sleepyteatimebear

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,467Chapters: 14/32Kudos: 129

Summary: Clark 'Superman' Kent, is a shoe-in for the NFL draft, a tall, dimpled, All-American-Type, College Football's Jesus. Bruce is well-known for his intense dedication to collegiate journalism, his all-black closet and the billions promised to him upon graduation. Bruce wants to sweep at the Collegiate Emmy's, Clark wants to go pro. So, they make a deal. Bruce can produce a media campaign that rallies the public behind Clark before Draft Day. Bruce helps to upkeep the Wayne Media Enterprise legacy, and Clark gets good press. But then, Clark and Bruce spend game-day after game-day together. Bruce asks Clark questions, studies him, captures him, writes all of him down. What's even more peculiar is Clark starts asking questions back. Questions that make Bruce feel like Clark wants to know him as more than just his shadow for the season. They can’t fall in love. It wouldn’t make practical sense. It wouldn’t make emotional sense. But couldn't it?

entry.summary:
Author: capricious_Bastard

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,821Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 17

Summary: There's a hush that befalls the city. Time has stopped for a moment as the big screens at Gotham Square flicker. Like a corrupted tape that's been stitched and Frankenstein-ed together. And they all watch as their heart falls.

entry.title: Missing (bat)Man
entry.summary:
Author: LadyRiversoftheNorth

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,261Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 54

Summary: This story is a Superbat story inspired by the manhua Missing Love: The Marrying Man. I treat cannon as my own personal playground so there will be some bending where I want to because I am god here. Unlike my other work, this will not have an update schedule, I apologize. Chapters will come as inspiration does, but I do not foresee it being more than a few weeks between each update. TW: Graphic descriptions of torture, violence, and rape in this fiction, (never between the ML and MC!)   When Bruce/Batman gets in over his head and is kidnapped, Superman must step in for Gotham, and for Bruce's ward/sidekick Dick Grayson. But as Clark Kent he must also track down Bruce Wayne...and he is not the world's greatest detective.
